name: 交织的时间
descs: 使敌方单位[Switch_Vibration]或[FusionVibration]时，使其[VibrationExplosion](每回合每名友方单位最多1次)
使敌方单位[Switch_Vibration]或[FusionVibration]时，使其[VibrationExplosion](每回合每名友方单位最多<style="upgradeHighlight">2</style>次)
使敌方单位[Switch_Vibration]或[FusionVibration]时，使其[VibrationExplosion](每回合每名友方单位最多<style="upgradeHighlight">3</style>次)
